title: SUOXU Indestructible Dog Bone Chew Toy, Extreme Tough Gourmet Stick Squeaky Interactive Toy for Medium Large Extra-Large Dogs
features: MADE OF DURABLE NYLON AND COFFEE WOOD – this long lasting dog chew toy challenges even the most aggressive chewers and discourages destructive chewing,Suitable for Large and extra-large Breed Dogs.

FUN & INTERACTIVE CHEW TOY - dog chew toys is a unique branches shape,and with the fragrance of trees to arouse the dog's interest, It allows the owner and the dog to play interactive games which are good for bonding and good for the physical and mental health of the dog.

DOG TEETH CLEANING TOY - The large dog toys has raised rubber partly stimulates the dog to chew, which allow the dog to cleaning their teeth while chewing. It can prevent the formation of dental calculus by biting and chewing, keep your dog’s dental health.

WEAR AND TEAR - You should understand that no chew toy is truly indestructible, smart dogs will always find a way to destroy them, but our product is definitely more durable than similar products on the market, as you can see in the video it can withstand aggressive chewers bites, but when wear reaches a certain level, you should consider replacing them.

SATISFACTION CUSTOMER SEERVICE - We will do our best to provide the best services for our customers about the dog dental toy. If you have any questions or feedback about the dog teeth cleaning toy, please reach out to us.
